choice: ousterhout-guru only; generic all-skills harness deferred
AI-native handoff (runnable + testable), not a human-prose doc
the real book (two-hop: book -> reference.md -> skill), not reference.md alone
define bar -> score current skill -> iterate until it meets bar (order load-bearing)
book-verified reference.verified.md in the cartridge + repoint skill; leave shared reference.md untouched
generate->re-rank iterate step + Trident-meta deferred-assumption gate
tune skill sub-sections only
note: restructure-output-contract initially selected, then DROPPED (design conflict with the fixed E1 structure check)

choice: cheap deterministic proxy ranks all -> full-bar judge on top survivors -> weighted winner
stage winner in cartridge; user promotes (no auto-apply to live skill)
candidate generator != checker/judge model; neither is Fable
durable + coarse (blocks next phase), not per-work-item edge
DECLINED (copyright); fair-use fixtures + fail-loud instead
local git init -> pushed public github.com/devpath56/skill-optimizer (sanitized, book gitignored)

name: RUN-01 fidelity loop
probe: planted-flaw non-circular answer key -> PASS (efficacy metric mechanizable)
score: efficacy SHIP-eligible on 3-doc slice; F2 8/8; F3 FAIL (6 fabricated items in the shared distillation, inherited by 4 skills)
iterate: built book-verified reference.verified.md (6 fabrications removed, 19 quotes verbatim-confirmed) -> fresh Auditor re-audit F3 PASS -> repointed ousterhout-guru

name: box 4-5 generate->re-rank
probe: cheap-proxy-ranks-same-as-full-bar -> PASS (proxy tracks the efficacy-moving lever; proven fidelity-blind)

name: E5 judge calibration
caveat: n=18, perfect agreement = small/easy set; harden with human-labeled hard cases before over-trusting

what: census reported AssumptionSet 'live' from a build-stub row
fix: liveness now requires a genuine intent+close loop; flipped back to an honest gap

what: first census durability fix was ungated (guard reverted with the fix; baseline import sys.exit -> silent green)
fix: moved control to a separate subprocess-driven file

what: fresh clone printed a false 'F3 PASS' with the book absent (echoed a recorded result)
fix: presence-checked fidelity: full-book F3 -> NOT-RUN/loud when book absent

choice: add loop-log.jsonl SSOT (runs/decisions/corrections) + engine/gate.py pre-ship gate with a negative control proving it BLOCKs a degraded skill; fresh-clone smoke test is subsumed

3-dimension truthfulness gate: T1 quote-fidelity (deterministic) + T2 no-fabricated/distorted-attributions incl. stance (validated judge) + T4 runtime honest-uncertainty; T3 stance-inversion FOLDED into T2, guarded by an explicit polarity rubric (guard #1) and a permanent inversion negative-control T2-09 (guard #2)

name: truthfulness gate
result: TRUTHFUL: T1 9/9 quotes verbatim; T2 judge VALIDATED TPR=TNR=1.0 with inversion control T2-09 CAUGHT; T4 0/5 fabricated citations on temptation probes, 5/5 hedged
caveat: T2 reached 1.0 only AFTER correcting a genuine labeling error in my by-construction set (T2-05) that the grounded judge caught — the judge earned trust by catching my mistake, not by agreeing with me

what: residual distortion in reference.verified.md that the earlier F3 audit PASSED: it frames Tcl unset as a positive 'define errors out of existence' example
fix: PENDING — book confirms unset is Ousterhout's MISTAKE example; positive examples are Windows file deletion (10.4) and Java substring (10.5). reference.verified.md define-errors section needs a source-grounded correction
caught_by: truthfulness gate T2 calibration (stricter than F3)

what: resolution of C04 (Tcl unset mis-framed as positive define-errors example)
fix: corrected all 3 reference copies (live skill, shared context-library, public repo): added the book's lead example Unix/Windows file deletion (10.4), kept Java substring (10.5), reframed Tcl unset as Ousterhout's OWN MISTAKE; transparent correction note left in-doc; T1 quote-fidelity still PASS

choice: collapse 3 PM-OS reference copies to ONE shared SSOT: repointed ousterhout-guru SKILL.md to context-library/.../philosophy-of-software-design-reference.md, deleted the per-skill reference.verified.md; all 4 Ousterhout skills now read one file; skill-optimizer manifest pointer updated. (The optimizer's own source/reference.verified.md remains as an intentional committed cartridge snapshot.)

closed the prove-durable UNGATED hole on reference.verified.md: a deterministic RG (regression-guard) dimension in the truthfulness gate checks 2 book-grounded phrases present only in the C04-corrected text, fail-closed (exit 1). Reverting the C04 fix now flips the gate RED; prove-durable confirms reference.verified.md DURABLE. Built under Trident (Simba ask -> RAT gate passed: probe confirmed the phrases discriminate current vs pre-C04 and are book-grounded, no inversion). RESIDUAL flagged: gate.py itself is UNGATED (reverting it removes RG) -- the recursive guard's-guard problem (CF-067 class), a later hole.

stopped overclaiming: E5 judge VALIDATED->'VALIDATED but PROVISIONAL (n=18, one-shot, no split)' in calibrate.py + README; efficacy relabeled 'probe-slice (recall n=1), not statistically robust'; README headline states this is a small-N SELECTOR + ship-gate, NOT a DSPy-class optimizer. No logic changed; keeps the artifacts, drops the inflated flags.

KEEP MIGRATION.md as a TRIGGERED plan, not 'someday'. Verdict KEEP: the DSPy-inside/rigor-outside composition is the correct growth path; selector+gate is honest and adequate at current N. KILLED the open-ended promise by pinning an explicit adoption trigger — adopt DSPy when (a) search outgrows the N hand-levers (a re-rank winner capped by the lever set, not the bar) or (b) ~100+ non-circular labeled examples exist for a real trainset/valset. Neither holds today (recall n=1, judge n=18) so DSPy stays parked. Doc-only; ungated by design (prove-durable reports UNGATED, correctly).

Built engine/gate_durability.py (CF-067 class): prove-durable applied to the gate. --selftest proves the gate distinguishes good from degraded; this proves --selftest is load-bearing by mutating gate.py's decision logic (M1 always-SHIP; M2 drop efficacy-RED reason) and REQUIRING --selftest to flip to fail, then restoring gate.py byte-for-byte (immediate + try/finally + hash check). A mutation whose target text is missing is a HARD FAIL, not a silent skip. Wired into CI (gates.yml) and README. Baseline + both mutations + restore all green.

A1: vendored the skill-under-test byte-faithfully to cartridges/ousterhout/skill/ (copyright-vetted: no verbatim book passages; only a synthetic example) + PROVENANCE.md; manifest.skill_file -> 'skill/SKILL.md'; preflight now requires a VENDORED (relative) skill_file as committed-required (fails loud if absent), external ~/abs paths stay back-compat. Engine does not score from it (no gate changed) - self-containment for pillar 1 (prototype-as-spec). B1: added the 'empty' state row (golden empty-01 + HONESTLY captured skill output via a real invocation). The capture surfaced a check false-positive: sections_present used a bare substring match, so the decline's own 5-section MENU PREVIEW counted as 5/5 emitted -> empty E-ref false FAIL. Fixed sections_present to count only HEADING lines (ATX or standalone bold), not name-mentions; verified flaw-laden stays 5/5, off-domain/empty go <5. The empty-01 golden is now the regression guard for that fix. State matrix 3/5 -> 4/5 live (ambiguous still judge-gated). All green: preflight READY, 4/4 rows PASS, gate SHIP, --selftest non-vacuous, gate_durability DURABLE.

Added a THIRD axis: Craft (S) - deterministic static checks that the architect's craft is CODIFIED IN THE SKILL FILE itself (engine/craft.py), complementing efficacy (outputs) and fidelity (content-vs-source). Cartridge-driven from manifest.craft + closed_vocab/expected_sections. Checks: S1 vocab, S2 output contract, S3 diagnostic framework, S4 source grounding (HARD, block the gate); S5 refusal-by-instruction, S6 worked example (advisory, NOTE). Machine-readable --json so agents get per-requirement PASS/FAIL + what's missing at ZERO model cost instead of fuzzy-judging. Non-vacuous --selftest (degrade skill -> S1 fails). Wired into gate.py (hard->BLOCK, advisory->NOTE, missing->INCOMPLETE) + CI. FINDING on the real ousterhout skill: S1-S4+S6 pass, but S5 refusal is NOT codified - the empty-state decline we saw in D21 was model-default, not instructed. Reported as advisory (SHIP preserved); codifying it is a Tier-2 skill improvement.

Encoded the grader as ADVERSARIAL + DETERMINISTIC + BINARY (Hamel/llm-evals): default FAIL, skill proves the pass. Formalized dual input contract (skill file OR authoritative resource; resource first-class). Added craft S7 (grounding travels: bundle must carry reachable grounding else downstream teaching agent fabricates - HARD, book-free, CI-safe) + S8 (grounding is real: bundled anecdotes verbatim in the authoritative book, none fabricated - HARD, NOT-RUN+loud when book absent). Answered the user's anecdote question deterministically: S7 FAILED the ousterhout skill (promises 'reference anecdotes from the book' but SKILL.md carries none, pointer unreachable downstream). Fixed by BUNDLING the book-verified distillation as skill/GROUNDING.md (grounding travels) -> S7 PASS, S8 PASS (unset/RAMCloud/temporal decomposition/information leakage all book-verbatim, fabricated absent). Bar met by fixing the skill, never relaxing the check. Residual: SKILL.md's context-check still points at the PM-OS path (skill-side re-vendor, noted advisory). CI-safe: book gitignored -> S8 NOT-RUN, S7 hard-passes, gate SHIP.

Built + RAN the actual optimize loop (engine/loop.py): eval -> deficiency -> gated authoritative retrieval -> grounded fix -> re-eval -> repeat, until bar met. Each deficiency an eval catches DRIVES a targeted retrieval that grounds the fix (never invented). Gated retrieval (manifest.retrieval): authoritative SOURCE (book) first; only if absent does it consult an allowlist of authoritative sites; non-allowlisted sources REFUSED, never silently fetched. Retrieval forces a BETTER passage: skips front-matter/TOC (<15%), picks the low-digit-density body passage (initial version wrongly grabbed the TOC snippet; fixed). Ran on ousterhout: caught S5 (refusal not codified) -> retrieved the book's own 'define errors out of existence' (chose 44% body passage over 0.7% TOC) -> staged a grounded refusal instruction citing the principle + GROUNDING.md -> S5 False->True CLOSED -> round 1 converged SHIP. Staged to staging/loop/SKILL.md + loop-report.json; live skill UNTOUCHED (staging discipline). Gate demonstrated: a book-absent query refused medium.com/random blogs, allowlist-only.

Encoded a MEMORABLE-MNEMONIC dimension in the craft bar (EPIC-style recall aid). Two deterministic adversarial checks: S9 (advisory) recall mnemonic is TAUGHT - the acronym appears as a standalone all-caps token in the skill/grounding (NOT the incidental lowercase word: first version false-passed on 'deep' in 'deep module'; fixed to case-sensitive \bDEEP\b); S10 (HARD, book-gated) recall mnemonic is GROUNDED - every letter maps to a real book principle verbatim in the authoritative source, so the mnemonic can never be fabricated (NOT-RUN+loud when book absent). Chose DEEP (Deep modules / Errors out of existence / Ease of reading / Pull complexity down) - the book's OWN central metaphor; verified all 4 letters grounded (deep module x10, out of existence x20, ease of reading x2, pull complexity x3). Ran the progressive driver: it now closes TWO deficiencies across rounds - round0 S5 refusal (retrieve 'define errors out of existence' 44%), round1 S9 mnemonic (retrieve 'deep module' 17% -> inject DEEP teaching block) -> round2 converged SHIP. Staged, live untouched. CI-safe (S10 NOT-RUN when book gitignored).

PROMOTED the loop's staged improvements to the live vendored skill: refusal-handling (grounded in 'define errors out of existence') + the DEEP memory hook. Live craft now 0 advisory gaps (S5+S9 pass); loop converges round 0. PROVENANCE updated (no longer byte-faithful -> optimizer-improved; flagged for re-vendor to PM-OS). Built the co-mutation governance guard (engine/comutation_guard.py): one repo, but the acceptance BAR is an independent authority - a change touching both skill-side (skill/) AND bar-side (manifest.json/BAR.md/validation/truthfulness) without a BAR-CHANGE-RATIFIED marker is FLAGGED. Non-vacuous selftest (4 cases); wired into CI (fetch-depth 0 + range check, NOT-RUN-safe) + selftest. This is the durable answer to the earlier skill-vs-derived-checks versioning question.

The loop's fix handlers are deterministic templates (S5, S9). An open-ended deficiency with no template routes to a MODEL ITERATE STEP - interface is defined in loop.py (apply_fix returns unchanged -> 'would route to a model iterate step'), generator is PARKED. This is the same DSPy-class generative trigger as D19: build the live generator when a deficiency needs open-ended authoring beyond templates + retrieval. Until then the loop is deterministic-only (honest, reproducible, zero model cost). Not a gap to hide - a documented parked extension point.

Encoded an AUTHORIAL VOICE dimension: can a teaching agent speak in the expert's voice (quotable signature lines), not just the jargon? manifest.craft.voice = 8 verbatim, fair-use (<15w), attributed Ousterhout signature quotes. S11 (advisory) voice TAUGHT: the skill's OWN persona surfaces >= min_quotes signature lines (skill-file level per the ask, not merely reachable in grounding). S12 (HARD, book-gated) voice REAL: every signature quote is verbatim in the authoritative source, so voice is never fabricated/misattributed - verified non-vacuous (a Knuth line 'premature optimization...' correctly FAILS as misattributed). Skill had 2/8 -> S11 failed; ran the driver: retrieve 'modules should be deep' (20% body) -> inject a 'Speak in the author's voice' block with 5 grounded quotes -> S11 closed -> promoted live. Craft now 0 gaps. This dimension directly guards the project's origin failure (fabricated Ousterhout quotes). Bar+skill co-mutation ratified (BAR-CHANGE-RATIFIED) - the governance guard's intended escape hatch.
